title: decamerium nanum
side_effects: Decamerium nanum can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to severe nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In addition, improper use of the plant may cause cardiovascular issues, including rapid heartbeat and lowered blood pressure. Furthermore, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can damage the liver and kidneys, leading to long-term health complications. In severe cases, improper use of Decamerium nanum can even cause respiratory failure and coma.
